cells.rationale: Contract-touching (extends MergeResult/readiness union + both consumers), crosses the producer/fold boundary with event-sourcing determinism, and is correctness-critical (must never eat uncommitted work via git blob-equality across filters/eol/mode) — but extends an existing mid-merge recovery template, so xhigh not max.

Touches the dispatch-failure routing contract and shared reason-string namespace, must preserve routeDispatchFailure's asserted-disjoint arms while adding positive-evidence-only level-clear and a per-lane distress surface — subtle invariants where a wrong abstraction propagates, despite mirroring existing trackers.
